text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 61 

MDCD_TOTAL_USE 

LABEL: Medicaid Use (Claim Count) — Total 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the total count of Medicaid inpatient (IP), long-term care (LT), pharmacy (RX), and 
other services (OT) (header) claims for the beneficiary for during the year, after removing the 
managed care capitated payment claims from the OT file. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Claims files (derived) 

VALUES: XX 

COMMENT: CCW
